name: Zhejiang Narada Power Source Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Narada Power Source Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, sells, and services communication backup, motive power, and renewable energy storage batteries and accessories. The company offers VRLA type lead acid batteries, lithium-ion cells and batteries, and related components and subsystems, as well as energy hybrid, DG/battery hybrid, battery cabinet, battery racks and accessories, and home and commercial energy storage solutions. Its products are used in telecom, electric power, railway, and other infrastructure industries, as well as used to store renewable energy from photovoltaic energy and wind farms. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China. Zhejiang Narada Power Source Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Narada Holdings Co., Ltd.
